title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: We're looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead the development of our recruiter-facing dashboards. You'll work closely with design and AI teams to ship explainable, data-dense interfaces.

title: Product Designer, AI Workflows
description: Design the next generation of explainable AI hiring tools. You'll own end-to-end flows from job creation through candidate decisions.

title: Backend Engineer, Ranking Systems
description: Build and scale the ranking and scoring pipelines that power candidate evaluation across thousands of resumes per job.

title: Growth Marketing Lead
description: Own demand generation and lifecycle marketing for our recruiter audience.
